## Summary

Describe the workflow, docs, or example change in a few lines.

## Validation

- [ ] Reviewed permissions for least privilege
- [ ] Pinned any new third-party actions by full commit SHA
- [ ] Updated docs or examples if the workflow contract changed
- [ ] Checked for secrets, credentials, or provider-specific assumptions

## Rollout Notes

List any consumer impact, migration note, or release/versioning implication.
